title: Ceramic Blue Wave
description: Premium ceramic tile with deep ocean blue glaze finish, inspired by Mediterranean coastlines. Perfect for bathrooms and kitchen backsplashes.
creator: DBL Ceramics
style: Modern coastal aesthetic with a satin finish that reflects light beautifully.

title: Marble Ivory Classic
description: Luxurious marble-effect porcelain tile with ivory tones and subtle grey veining. Timeless elegance for living spaces.
creator: DBL Ceramics
style: Timeless Italian marble look with high-polished surface for grand interiors.

title: Geometric Black Hex
description: Bold hexagonal tiles in matte black finish. Create stunning geometric patterns for contemporary spaces.
creator: DBL Ceramics
style: Industrial-modern style with matte black finish for bold statement floors.

title: Terracotta Rustic Earth
description: Hand-crafted terracotta tiles with warm earthy tones. Brings natural warmth and authenticity to any space.
creator: DBL Ceramics
style: Organic handmade aesthetic with natural color variations in every tile.

title: Forest Green Gloss
description: Vibrant forest green glazed tiles with high-gloss finish. Perfect for accent walls and statement spaces.
creator: DBL Ceramics
style: Botanical-inspired gloss finish that brings the outdoors inside.

title: Sandstone Beige Natural
description: Natural sandstone-inspired porcelain tiles with textured matte surface for slip-resistant outdoor use.

style: Desert landscape aesthetic with anti-slip texture for outdoor terraces.

title: Midnight Navy Subway
description: Classic subway tiles in deep midnight navy. A modern twist on the timeless metro tile style.

style: Neo-classic metro style with rich navy glaze for sophisticated spaces.

title: Rose Gold Metallic
description: Stunning metallic finish tiles with rose gold tones. Adds glamour and sophistication to luxury interiors.
creator: DBL Ceramics
